observed_strengths: Sufficient local or indexed cases stayed on cheaper paths instead of escalating externally.
A permissive but bounded operator policy admitted external re-query for a genuine mission-linked gap and improved the mission outcome.
recommendation_summary: Across the validated mission classes, conservative policy preserved cheaper sufficient paths while permissive bounded policy admitted external re-query only for genuine gaps.
recommended_operator_guidance: Prefer conservative or review-first posture for local packaging, integrity, and docs work; switch to permissive_bounded only when a mission-linked external gap is genuine and artifact-backed.
